stories.title: NBA playoffs: Previewing the second round
stories.summary: Our NBA insiders answer the biggest questions heading into the second round of the NBA playoffs.

stories.title: 10 lessons from a strange Round 1 and their impact...
stories.summary: ESPN analyst Zach Kram breaks down the NBA's first round, and explores its impact on the rest of the playoffs and offseason.

stories.title: Magic fire head coach Mosley after 5 seasons
stories.summary: Jamahl Mosley was fired as coach of the Orlando Magic on Monday, paying the widely expected price after the team blew a 3-1 series lead and got eliminated by the Detroit Pistons in Round 1 of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

stories.title: Cavs close out Raptors in 7 behind Allen's 22-19
stories.summary: A more vocal and animated Jarrett Allen scored 22 points and pulled down 19 rebounds, in leading the Cavaliers to a 114-102 win over the Raptors in Game 7 of their first-round series Sunday night.

stories.title: C's Brown says refs had 'agenda,' calls out Embiid...
stories.summary: Jaylen Brown, appearing on his Twitch stream Sunday, took issue with the officiating against him during the Celtics-76ers series, as well as with Joel Embiid, whom he accused of the type of flopping that has "ruined our game."
